description_long: This is a heavily armored, dark green combat tactical vehicle with a robust, riveted exterior and a multi-segmented chassis supported by six large, tank-like treads. The vehicle features a prominent central turret equipped with a large-caliber cannon and a secondary, smaller gun mounted on top, along with various hatches and periscopes for crew access and visibility. The body is covered in thick, angular armor plating with visible rivets and reinforced sections, especially around the turret and lower hull. The side profile reveals additional weapon mounts and equipment, as well as detailed tread mechanisms for enhanced mobility over rough terrain. The vehicle's surface is finished in a dark, matte green with metallic highlights and no visible camouflage pattern or military insignia. Its design suggests a focus on durability, firepower, and urban combat effectiveness.
description: A dark green, heavily armored combat vehicle with a central turret, large cannon, and six tank-like treads, covered in riveted plating and metallic details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced central turret, main cannon, and the wide, armored treads flanking the hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, secondary gun mount, and detailed tread mechanisms.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor plating, engine compartment, and the symmetrical arrangement of the treads.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, cannon, and tread details, with visible hatches and equipment.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large-caliber cannon mounted on the central turret, one secondary gun mount on top of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, riveted steel armor plating; reinforced around the turret, lower hull, and tread guards; angular and robust design.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green paint with metallic highlights; no visible camouflage pattern.
